## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing Done
- [ ] Tested in single-player game
- [ ] Tested in multiplayer game (specify number of players: ___)
- [ ] No new errors in game log
- [ ] Command output correct
- [ ] Normal chat still works

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes thoroughly
- [ ] If AI-assisted: I have disclosed AI use and reviewed all code

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number, if applicable)
